item.title: Stop Putting Secrets in Your Repo. Seriously.
item.description:
OK. We've all been there. You're setting up a new microservice, you need a database connection string, a Keycloak client secret, an OCIR auth token — and before you know it, you're copy-pasting credentials into a .tfvars file and telling yourself "I'll fix this later".

Later never comes. Until it does …
item.dc:creator: samreghenzi

item.title: Forecasting Time Series from a COVID-19 Red Zone
item.description:
Hello, dear citizen of the free world. I’m writing while I’m in a restricted lifestyle. On Monday night Italy’s prime minister decided that the entire country would be covered by restrictions that can be summarised as follows:

“I stay at home”

All travel was banned unless justified …
item.dc:creator: samreghenzi

item.title: I will ride like a gentlemen
item.description:
I will ride like a gentlemen

On September 24th I will ride in the Distinguished Gentlemen Ride

This is me an my bike at a recent Ducati Scrambler event

As a rider of a stylish Ducati Scrambler, I will join my local chapter of the DGR. It is a retro-themed …
item.dc:creator: samreghenzi
